## Type

- [ ] New/updated guardrail pattern
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New harness adapter
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] New patterns include a test that blocks the dangerous form **and** allows a benign neighbor
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies
- [ ] Conventional Commit title (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, …)
